steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and Golden Waters. The correct choice must assert something the two sculptures share, not contrast them or describe only one.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Uros House is an LED light sculpture made by Luciana Vargas, as is Golden Waters.: Both sculptures are LED light works by the same artist — this states a genuine shared trait using parallel structure (“as is”). ✓
  • Choice B — The smooth LED domes of Luciana Vargas's Uros House stand in contrast to the tangled LED tubes of Golden Waters.: “Stand in contrast” is an explicit statement of difference, the opposite of similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — Luciana Vargas is the artist behind Uros House—a sculpture made of smooth multicolored LED domes.: Describes only Uros House and says nothing about Golden Waters. No comparison is made. ✗
  • Choice D — At 118,080 cubic feet in size, Luciana Vargas's Golden Waters cuts a larger figure than the 250-cubic-foot Uros House.: Highlights a size difference (larger vs. smaller), which emphasizes a contrast, not a similarity. ✗
A is correct.
